ideation: This animation sequence will represent the time 7:30, using the robot's arms to mimic the hands on a clock.  The left arm will represent the hour hand (7), and the right arm will represent the minute hand (30).  The movement will be a smooth transition from the starting position to the final pose representing the time. The robot's arms do not have elbows, so the positions will be approximations of a clock hand.  I'll use joint1 to position the arms and joint2 to set the angle. The wrists will remain neutral to keep the focus on the arm positions.

frames.beat: arms start at rest, ready to tell time
the hour hand sweeps down, minute hand moves forward
hour hand continues its slow arc, minute hand nears the half
